inst_welcome_text_1:
Welcome to this experiment. 
 
 Please read the following instructions carefully.
inst_text_ver_1: In the next screen, you will see two dots jumping up and down
inst_text_hor_1: Now they will jump from left to right.
inst_text_amb_1: If they jump at different times, you can see either up-down or left-right motion.
inst_text_amb_2:
At some point you might notice a change in the direction of motion. 
 
 You might see them first going up and down and later left to right or the other way around. 
 
 It can also be that you see the same all the time.
inst_text_mml_1: In the next screen, the distance of the dots will vary over time, making it easier to see a change in the direction of motion.
inst_text_mml_2: If the spacing is very narrow at first, you will likely see left-right motion at first and up-down motion later.
inst_text_mml_3: If the spacing is very wide at first, you will likely see up-down motion at first and left-right motion later.
inst_text_mml_4: Next, please press SPACE as soon as you notice a change in the direction of movement.
inst_text_mml_5:
There are now a few trials with changing distances. 
 
 Please press SPACE as soon as you notice a change in the direction of movement.
exp_text_1: Some more instructions for the main experiment:
exp_text_2: From now, on focus on the center of the screen and try to keep your gaze on the fixation cross.
exp_text_3: You will now see an entire row of the jumping dots.
exp_text_4: You might notice how they all do the same thing - either all go up-down or all go left-right
exp_text_5: The first few jumps can determine how you see the dots moving for a certain time.
exp_text_6: If all dots jump together a few times before they start jumping separately, it can influence how you see them move for a while.
exp_text_7: In the next screen you will likely see all dots move up and down for a while.
exp_text_8: Now you will likely see them move from left to right.
exp_text_9:
After the first few jumps, the dots start jumping separately again. 
 
 Right after this change, the dots will likely jump in the same direction as the initial parallel movement. 
 
 After a while, the direction might still spontaneously change.
exp_text_10:
Please pay attention which direction the dots are jumping. 
 
 As soon as the dots changed into the state where they jump separately, if you notice the direction change, press SPACE as fast as possible.
exp_text_11:
IMPORTANT:
 
 At the beginning of some trials, all dots will move in the same direction
 (only up-down OR only left-right).
 
 This initial motion is intentional.
 Do NOT press SPACE during this part.
 
 After a short time, the motion becomes ambiguous and may switch.
 
 ONLY press SPACE when you notice a change in motion direction
 during this later, ambiguous phase.
exp_text_12:
Please focus your attention on the two dots jumping in the center of the screen. 
 
 You may notice changes in the jumping of the dots tp the left or right. 
 
 Only respond if you notice a change of direction in the center dots.
exp_text_13: When you are ready, press SPACE to start.
exp_break_text_1:
Time for a short break. 
 Press space to continue when you are ready.
exp_complete_text:
Thank you for participating! 
 Please press SPACE to finish and inform the experimenter about the completion.
